Description: integ test stack for MetadataContext; exercises resource + template level context

Context.arch: SQS buffer -> consumer; DLQ for poison msgs

Context.why: buffer order events async; std queue (throughput > ordering)
must: VisTimeout >= 6x consumer timeout, else dup on retry
failureModes: retry 3x w/ exp backoff before DLQ

Context.why: fan-out of alert events to oncall channels
gaps: delivery retry policy never validated under load

BootstrapVersion.Description: Version of the CDK Bootstrap resources in this environment, automatically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store. [cdk:skip]

Assertions.AssertDescription: CDK bootstrap stack version 6 required. Please run 'cdk bootstrap' with a recent version of the CDK CLI.
